//: The Go/ttsc lowering-emit stage of the publish build (scripts/build-package.ts stage-then-bundle): the @rhombus-std/primitives.transformer ttsc plugin (a Go sidecar) rewrites each nameof<T>() call to its derived token string (and elides the consumed import) as @ttsc/unplugin/bun transforms each src file in the per-file stage, which bun build then bundles into dist/. Extends tsconfig.json so the stage inherits the package typecheck profile (and any self-reference condition). Typecheck/lint stay on plain tsc: nameof typechecks as an ordinary string-returning function.
